\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Option that captures a string argument. 

Example\+: "{}-\/j input.\+job"{} stores "{}input.\+job"{}. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{CLParser_8h_source_l00125}{125}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{CLParser_8h_source}{CLParser.\+h}}.
